draft.title: ai workspace
draft.summary: Drafting your prototype from the swipes…
draft.html:
ai workspace

Building your first draft…

facade.hypothesis: Users building AI workspaces prefer dark color schemes for reduced eye strain and modern aesthetic
facade.label: Dark mode interface
facade.acceptImplies: Explore darker palettes, high contrast text, glow effects for accent elements
facade.rejectImplies: Explore bright/light backgrounds, softer contrast, natural daylight-inspired color schemes

evidence.hypothesis: Users building AI workspaces prefer dark color schemes for reduced eye strain and modern aesthetic
evidence.implication: Explore darker palettes, high contrast text, glow effects for accent elements

facade.hypothesis: Users prefer a persistent left navigation paired with a central canvas of draggable, stacked cards over a tabbed or full-width list approach
facade.axisTargeted: Navigation anchoring (sidebar vs tabs) + content density (cards vs lists)
facade.label: Sidebar with floating cards
facade.acceptImplies: Explore variants: collapsible sidebar, card grouping, drag-and-drop workflows
facade.rejectImplies: Test tab-based navigation or a single unified list layout next

axes.label: Whether user prefers minimal/clean aesthetic vs rich/detailed visual design for their workspace
Whether user wants tools always visible vs hidden/revealed on demand in their interface layout
Whether user responds to encouraging/motivational tone vs neutral/professional communication style
Whether user wants a calm/focused atmosphere vs energetic/stimulating workspace mood
Whether user prefers data-heavy dashboards vs simple, task-focused information display
Whether user likes smooth/animated transitions vs instant/snappy interface responses

scout_assignments.probe_axis: Whether user prefers minimal/clean aesthetic vs rich/detailed visual design for their workspace
scout_assignments.reason: Cold start: first question for Iris

scout_assignments.probe_axis: Whether user wants tools always visible vs hidden/revealed on demand in their interface layout
scout_assignments.reason: Cold start: first question for Prism

scout_assignments.probe_axis: Whether user responds to encouraging/motivational tone vs neutral/professional communication style
scout_assignments.reason: Cold start: first question for Lumen

scout_assignments.probe_axis: Whether user wants a calm/focused atmosphere vs energetic/stimulating workspace mood
scout_assignments.reason: Cold start: first question for Aura

scout_assignments.probe_axis: Whether user prefers data-heavy dashboards vs simple, task-focused information display
scout_assignments.reason: Cold start: first question for Facet

scout_assignments.probe_axis: Whether user likes smooth/animated transitions vs instant/snappy interface responses
scout_assignments.reason: Cold start: first question for Echo

facade.hypothesis: Users want key metrics visible at a glance rather than buried in detailed reports
facade.label: Dashboard numbers
facade.acceptImplies: Prioritize scannable KPIs, gauges, and summary stats over comprehensive tables and narratives
facade.rejectImplies: Users need full context and detail—lean into longer-form explanations and complete datasets

facade.hypothesis: AI workspace users prefer soft elevation and spatial separation of interface elements to reduce cognitive load and create visual hierarchy
facade.axisTargeted: Depth and layering (light vs heavy visual weight)
facade.label: Floating cards
facade.acceptImplies: Explore subtle shadow systems, floating panels, generous negative space, and layered card-based layouts with soft depth cues
facade.rejectImplies: Users may prefer flat, unified surfaces without elevation effects; consider inline content organization and reduced shadow/3D effects

facade.hypothesis: Users building an AI workspace prefer fluid, continuous motion over snappy, instant state changes when manipulating interface elements.
facade.label: Smooth drag interactions
facade.acceptImplies: Prioritize easing curves, momentum scrolling, and gesture-based transitions; design for continuous feedback rather than discrete clicks.
facade.rejectImplies: Favor instant feedback, crisp state changes, and minimal transition overhead; optimize for predictability and quick visual confirmation over motion.

facade.hypothesis: The user may prefer interfaces with subtle depth and layering over flat, harsh contrast
facade.axisTargeted: warm vs cool (and implicitly: organic vs digital)
facade.label: Soft shadows
facade.acceptImplies: User leans toward ambient, diffused visual language—possibly calming, possibly depth-rich. Signals comfort with gentle visual hierarchy.
facade.rejectImplies: User may prefer clarity through contrast, boldness, or flatness. Possibly energetic or minimalist taste. Signals skepticism of subtle effects.

facade.hypothesis: Users building AI workspaces prefer conversational, personality-driven interfaces over sterile technical tones
facade.label: Chatty assistant voice
facade.acceptImplies: Design should emphasize warm, human-like communication; use contractions, casual language, character-driven copy
facade.rejectImplies: Design should lean toward clear, direct, no-nonsense language; minimize personality in favor of functional clarity

draft.title: AI Workspace Hub
draft.summary: A focused workspace interface for managing AI tasks, projects, and collaborative workflows. Clean, minimal design with warm neutrals and intuitive navigation.
